prompt: Slow dolly-in on a clinic hallway at 5:00pm, soft golden hour light spilling through a window. A clinician walks past camera carrying her bag, smiling at a colleague. Ambient sound: muted laughter, no rush. Palette: clinical white, deep medical navy, trust teal, oxygenated mint, soft slate. Mood: calm, evidence-based, post-burnout. Style: editorial product photography, soft natural light, shallow depth of field, color grade favoring teal-and-navy, no HUD overlays, no glowing brain holograms, no stock-photo cliches. Avoid futuristic blue HUD, matrix code overlay, robot hand touching human hand, stethoscope on laptop.
